reasoning: I will provide a concise summary of the article, highlighting the key facts: the players named, their ages and clubs, the event (Junior World Championship), Wales' Pool A opponents and location, and the quoted comment from Scarlets' GM.
output: Hooker Hughes, 20, and 19-year-old flanker Evans have been named in Wales’ squad for June’s Junior World Championship. Hughes featured for Llandovery in the 2015-16 season, while Evans has played for Scarlets’ Under-18 side. Wales will face Ireland, Georgia and New Zealand in Pool A in Manchester. Scarlets’ general manager of rugby Jon Daniels said both players enjoyed a very successful Six Nations and will take confidence into the World Championships.
